 {"id":"gt-8tmz.30","title":"Proto debugging and inspection tools","description":"Tools for understanding cooked protos:
- bd cook --dry-run (already planned)
- Step-through cooking: see each compose rule applied
- Diff between proto versions
- Provenance tracing: which formula/rule produced this step?
- Visualization of step graph (ASCII or graphviz)
